prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SHM-MVCHCSDS-STD-LARGE-VAR Product Type: SAFE Brand (from catalog): IGE Innovative Internet Products Existing Title: The Spy Bolt Covert Hidden Contents Secret Stealth Container - 3.91 Cubic Inch Description: The Spy Bolt is an updated and improved version of the old Soviet KGB "dead drop" hollow bolt used during the Cold War. It features an O-ring seal for weather-proof storage of small valuables, communications, and anything that can fit within the hollowed out inner of the bolt.

The simple, ingenious design is essential for the concealable gadgets spy work calls for. The Spy Bolt fits the bill perfectly.

The Mega bolt is a larger version of the original Spy Bolt with double the storage capacity and comes with a single glass 1 Dram vial for added safety.

Beware of cheap, imitation knock offs. The original spy bolt is designed and made in the USA. Search Terms: Diversion Safe Spy Secrets Hidden Money Features: - MEGA BOLT - Extra Large Capacity with an Included 1 Dram Glass Vial - WEATHER PROOF SEAL - Bolt Head Incorporates a Rubber O-Ring for an Air Tight Seal of your Contents - DESIGN - Reverse Threaded Bolt Head to Prevent Accidental Opening and to Foil Thieves - DIMENSIONS: Length: 4.4 Inches | Volume: 3.91 Cubic Inches | 15/16" Diameter Bolt (11/16" Inside Diameter) | High Quality Construction, Made in the USA - DIVERSION SAFE - Ideal for Hiding Small Valuables, Bills, Communications, Micro SD Cards and More === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
